summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of The Hobbit / Bilbo Baggins study site (frontend-only React app with localStorage persistence). 18/18 functional checks passed across home page, navigation, all 4 section pages, PIN dialog, inline text editing, image-prompt editing, add/remove sections, lock toggle, and mobile responsiveness. No bugs found.

issues: Top nav row collapses 'Edit'/'Editing' label leaving only the lock icon visible — this is intentional per the `hidden sm:inline` class but worth noting. No functional impact.

critical_code_review_comments: ContentContext.deepMerge: `if (Array.isArray(base)) return Array.isArray(override) ? override : base;` — works fine for the items array (override fully replaces). Acceptable.

EditableImage: window.prompt is intentionally used per spec. Works in Playwright via dialog handler. No XSS sanitisation on image URL — acceptable for a school project, but worth noting if ever generalised.
SectionPage.addItem id uses Date.now(); fine for a single-user local app.
No data-testid on the AccordionTrigger button itself — testing has to use `[data-testid='..-item-N'] button`. Not blocking but adding `data-testid='..-item-N-trigger'` would be cleaner.
Default content uses Unsplash placeholder URLs — confirmed they may sometimes fail to load on slow networks; elements still render and EditableImage wrapper remains clickable, which is the contract.
seed_data_creation: Cleared localStorage at start to ensure fresh defaultContent. No persistent seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is purely frontend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. localStorage keys: 'hobbit-site-content-v1' (content) and 'hobbit-site-edit-v1' (edit-mode flag '1'/'0'). To pre-set edit mode, set edit-v1 to '1' before navigation. window.prompt is used for image edits — register page.on('dialog', lambda d: d.accept(URL)) BEFORE clicking the image. Confirmation dialogs (remove/reset) also use window.confirm — accept via the same handler. Section item counts in defaults: motivations=4, philosophy=6, traits=5, events=8. Top-level item testids match pattern '{section}-item-{idx}' with exactly 2 hyphens; sub-element testids have more hyphens (used to filter).
tests_executed: Home page loads with title, 4 chapter cards
Desktop nav: all 5 routes navigate and section pages render with correct accordion item counts (4/6/5/8)
Edit toggle opens PinDialog; wrong PIN shows pin-error 'Incorrect PIN. Please try again.'
Correct PIN 264185 unlocks edit mode; nav-export and nav-reset appear
Inline text edit: click home-title -> textarea; fill+blur saves to localStorage and survives reload
Image edit: clicking motivations-item-0-image triggers window.prompt; provided URL persists to localStorage
Add new section button creates a 5th motivations item
Remove section button (with confirm) decrements item count
Lock toggle hides export/reset/add-item buttons and disables click-to-edit on text
Mobile (390x844): all 5 mobile nav links visible and functional
